title: Visuality
description: Improve Minecraft visuals while keeping it close to vanilla
body:
![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8tw4ZBg9/images/21ffb5305e654e37447cac5af2fb840a045b85e3.png)This modpack improves the visual fidelity of minecraft, giving it a greater depth of immersiveness.

This modpack incorporates the mods used by youtubers such as BdoubleO100
to give that improved yet simple look to Minecraft.

The modpack is mainly targetted for builders,
It will be updated in the future.
Forge support might get Added.

with that i hope you enjoy.
